issue_title: [Bug]: icons missing in recorder dialog when inside iframe
issue_body: ### Version 1.48.1 ### Steps to reproduce 1. Run: ``` npx playwright codegen "data:text/html," ``` 2. Use **Assert Text** to pick `Hello World` ### Expected behavior Dialog should display accept and close icons. ### Actual behavior Dialog accept and close buttons appear like this: ![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7bf022e0-5748-4c13-9b7a-4ee184097247) ### Additional context Icons are svg `clipPaths` that are only attached to `x-pw-overlay`, which is not rendered on iframes. I can submit a PR to fix it. ### Environment System: OS: Windows 11 10.0.22631 CPU: (12) x64 13th Gen Intel(R) Core(TM) i5-1335U Memory: 10.95 GB / 31.66 GB Binaries: Node: 20.17.0 - ~\scoop\apps\nvm\current\nodejs\nodejs\node.EXE npm: 10.8.2 - ~\scoop\apps\nvm\current\nodejs\nodejs\npm.CMD IDEs: VSCode: 1.94.2 - C:\Users\rui.figueira\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin\code.CMD Languages: Bash: 5.2.37 - C:\Users\rui.figueira\scoop\shims\bash.EXE npmPackages: @playwright/test: ^1.48.1 => 1.48.1
